boundary: Cross-tool dependency graph as an Effect Context.Service, external to Tool.Def, replacing string-matching toolCategory() with data-flow-aware pipeline suggestions for all 80 tools
consumer_purpose: The LLM receives pipeline-aware next-tool suggestions after every tool call. After smart_find it sees read_source/read (data-flow consumers), not same-category search tools.
claim_atoms: NEW tool-graph.ts Effect service (Interface + Service + layer + defaultLayer) with ToolGraph class, auto-node generation, 28 seeded edges, BFS traversal
MODIFY typed-result.ts: delete TOOL_CATEGORIES/toolCategory(), use graph via setToolGraph() injection. External signatures preserved
MODIFY registry.ts: add suggestNext() + suggestPipeline() to Interface, build graph after tool init in layer
NEW test/tool/tool-graph.test.ts: 10 test cases covering construction, traversal, edge cases, integration

root_causes.hypothesis: No graph data structure — Tool.Def has zero metadata about produces/consumes. Affordances hardcoded per category in switch/case
String-matching category assignment (toolID.includes()) misclassifies 62/80 tools to 'diagnose' fallback. Static map unreachable for mismatched IDs
TOOL_CATEGORIES covers 18/80 tools (22.5%). Must be manually updated per new tool
Same-category-only suggestions can't express cross-category pipelines (search→read, delegation→monitoring, discovery→publication)

fixes.description: Create Effect Context.Service module with ToolGraph class, buildGraph() factory, 28 seeded edges, BFS traversal
fixes.conventions: Follows truncate.ts:48 pattern: Interface → Service extends Context.Service → Layer.effect → defaultLayer → export * as ToolGraph

fixes.description: Delete TOOL_CATEGORIES (L225-233) and toolCategory() (L235-243). Add setToolGraph() injection. Rewrite suggestion/affordance functions to use graph lookups
fixes.changes: Delete ~30 lines, add ~35 lines. Net change: ~5 lines. External signatures unchanged.
fixes.signature_preservation: makeSuccess, makeFailure, makeDenied, makeCancelled, fromDefect, wrapExecute — all external signatures unchanged

fixes.description: Add suggestNext(fromId) and suggestPipeline(fromId, goalKind) to Interface. Build graph during layer construction after all Tool.init() calls resolve. Call setToolGraph()
fixes.changes: Add ~15 lines to Interface + layer body

fixes.description: 10 test cases: graph construction, traversal, pipeline suggestion, edge cases, integration with typed-result and registry

rollback_plan: Revert 2 new files + 2 modified files. No migration data. No DB changes. No plugin API changes.

foundation.key_finding: coordination ∈ TOOL_CATEGORIES['manage'] but toolCategory('coordination') → 'diagnose' — static map unreachable for mismatched IDs. 62/80 tools collapse to diagnose.

load_bearer.key_finding: ZERO external consumers of suggestedNextTools/nextAffordances outside typed-result.ts. Data reaches LLM via formatOutput() serialization only. No plugin impact.

zoning_board.key_finding: Must use Context.Service pattern, not plain class. Test dir is test/ not tests/. File named tool-graph.ts (no underscore).
